column1: We always (to have) a dog and a cat. We love pets.
I (to love) dogs since I was a child.
The rain already (to stop) and the sun is shining in the sky again.
The wind (to blow) off the man’s hat, and he cannot catch it.
The weather (to change), and we can go for a walk.
The children already (to decide) what to do with the books.
I (not to see) you for a long time.
You ever (to spend) your holidays in the Crimea?
